goal: Reduce manual reconciliation before clinical AI project review.

structured_brief.goal: Reduce manual reconciliation before clinical AI project review.
structured_brief.problem_statement: Project leads submit fragmented descriptions that delay review readiness checks.
structured_brief.evidence_of_problem: Three service leads reported recurring reconciliation delays in the last intake cycle.
structured_brief.current_alternatives: Manual review meetings and spreadsheet notes.
structured_brief.scope: Early Alpha intake for problem and solution definition only.
